<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]]
'''Ōno Clan''' (大野氏) refers to one of the Japanese clans. Apart from the lineage described below, many other clans share this name.
* The ancient aristocratic Ōno Clan was a branch of the {{ill|Kamitsukeno Clan|ja|上毛野氏|1=Kamitsukeno clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitsukeno Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitsukeno clan|qq=}} and bore the title {{ill|Ason|en|Ason|WD=Q4807592|lt=Ason}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Musashi Province)|ja|大野氏 (武蔵国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Musashi Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Village, {{ill|Chichibu District, Saitama|en|Chichibu District, Saitama|WD=Q1145581|lt=Chichibu District, Musashi Province}}, {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Owari Province)|ja|大野氏 (尾張国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Owari Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Village, {{ill|Chita District|en|Chita District|WD=Q767312|lt=Chita District, Owari Province}}, {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province}}. Descended from the Uno branch of the {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|WD=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji}} (also called the {{ill|Asahi Clan|ja|朝日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Clan|1=Asahi Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517554}}). * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Echizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (越前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Echizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from {{ill|Ōno District, Fukui|en|Ōno District, Fukui|WD=Q8081656|lt=Ōno District, Echizen Province}}, {{ill|Echizen Province|en|Echizen Province|WD=Q1047144|lt=Echizen Province}}. Similarly descended from the Shiba branch of the Seiwa Genji. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Harima Province)|ja|大野氏 (播磨国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Harima Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno in Hokujō Township, {{ill|Harima Province|en|Harima Province|WD=Q1047523|lt=Harima Province}} (currently Ōno, {{ill|Kakogawa, Hyōgo|en|Kakogawa, Hyōgo|WD=Q750569|lt=Kakogawa, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture). Claimed descent from the {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|WD=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji}} and produced figures such as {{ill|Bunkan|ja|文観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunkan|1=Monkan-bō Kōshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11500110}}, a monk serving Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Iyo Province)|ja|大野氏 (伊予国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Iyo Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno in {{ill|Kita District, Ehime|en|Kita District, Ehime|WD=Q1206404|lt=Kita District, Iyo Province}}, {{ill|Iyo Province|en|Iyo Province|WD=Q907829|lt=Iyo Province}}. Claimed lineages include the {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|WD=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana Clan}}, Fujiwara Clan, or descendants of Prince {{ill|Iyo|ja|伊予親王|1=Iyo Shinnō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Shinnō|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大野氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Bungo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Township in {{ill|Ōno District, Gifu|en|Ōno District, Gifu|WD=Q31671|lt=Ōno District, Bungo Province}}, {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province}}. A branch of the {{ill|Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大神氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|1=Ōga clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438332}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Beppu in {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|WD=Q259705|lt=Higo Province}} (referenced in "Kantō Chijōjō-an," Jōō 3, 21st day of the 5th month). Connected to the {{ill|Kino Clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kino Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, descendants of the priests of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū Shrine}} in Kyoto. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Manor in {{ill|Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja|高木郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Hizen Province|en|Hizen Province|WD=Q906926|lt=Hizen Province}} (referenced in the "Fukae Family Documents," designated an Important Cultural Property of Saga Prefecture, March 16, 1987). * The '''Ōno Clan''' was also a surname of the {{ill|Xianbei|en|Xianbei|WD=Q861054|lt=Xianbei}} or {{ill|Kang-chü|en|Kang-chü|WD=Q1493790|lt=Gaoche}} peoples. It was granted to {{ill|Li Hu (general)|en|Li Hu (general)|WD=Q5370334|lt=Li Hu}} by Emperor {{ill|Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja|北魏の孝文帝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

A branch of the {{ill|Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大神氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|1=Ōga clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438332}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Beppu in {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|WD=Q259705|lt=Higo Province|1=Higo Province}} (referenced in "Kantō Chijōjō-an," Jōō 3, 21st day of the 5th month). Connected to the {{ill|Kino Clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kino Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, descendants of the priests of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū Shrine|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}} in Kyoto. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Manor in {{ill|Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja|高木郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Hizen Province|en|Hizen Province|WD=Q906926|lt=Hizen Province|1=Hizen Province}} (referenced in the "Fukae Family Documents," designated an Important Cultural Property of Saga Prefecture, March 16, 1987). * The '''Ōno Clan''' was also a surname of the {{ill|Xianbei|en|Xianbei|WD=Q861054|lt=Xianbei|1=Xianbei}} or {{ill|Kang-chü|en|Kang-chü|WD=Q1493790|lt=Gaoche|1=Kang-chü}} peoples. It was granted to {{ill|Li Hu (general)|en|Li Hu (general)|WD=Q5370334|lt=Li Hu|1=Li Hu (general)}} by Emperor {{ill|Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja|北魏の孝文帝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]]
'''Ōno Clan''' (大野氏) refers to one of the Japanese clans. Apart from the lineage described below, many other clans share this name.
* The ancient aristocratic Ōno Clan was a branch of the {{ill|Kamitsukeno Clan|ja|上毛野氏|1=Kamitsukeno clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitsukeno Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitsukeno clan|qq=}} and bore the title {{ill|Ason|en|Ason|WD=Q4807592|lt=Ason|1=Ason}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Musashi Province)|ja|大野氏 (武蔵国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Musashi Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Village, {{ill|Chichibu District, Saitama|en|Chichibu District, Saitama|WD=Q1145581|lt=Chichibu District, Musashi Province|1=Chichibu District, Saitama}}, {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Owari Province)|ja|大野氏 (尾張国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Owari Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Village, {{ill|Chita District|en|Chita District|WD=Q767312|lt=Chita District, Owari Province|1=Chita District}}, {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}. Descended from the Uno branch of the {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|WD=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (also called the {{ill|Asahi Clan|ja|朝日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Clan|1=Q11517554|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517554}}). * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Echizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (越前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Echizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from {{ill|Ōno District, Fukui|en|Ōno District, Fukui|WD=Q8081656|lt=Ōno District, Echizen Province|1=Ōno District, Fukui}}, {{ill|Echizen Province|en|Echizen Province|WD=Q1047144|lt=Echizen Province|1=Echizen Province}}. Similarly descended from the Shiba branch of the Seiwa Genji. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Harima Province)|ja|大野氏 (播磨国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Harima Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno in Hokujō Township, {{ill|Harima Province|en|Harima Province|WD=Q1047523|lt=Harima Province|1=Harima Province}} (currently Ōno, {{ill|Kakogawa, Hyōgo|en|Kakogawa, Hyōgo|WD=Q750569|lt=Kakogawa, Hyōgo|1=Kakogawa, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture). Claimed descent from the {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|WD=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}} and produced figures such as {{ill|Bunkan|ja|文観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunkan|1=Monkan-bō Kōshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11500110}}, a monk serving Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Iyo Province)|ja|大野氏 (伊予国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Iyo Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno in {{ill|Kita District, Ehime|en|Kita District, Ehime|WD=Q1206404|lt=Kita District, Iyo Province|1=Kita District, Ehime}}, {{ill|Iyo Province|en|Iyo Province|WD=Q907829|lt=Iyo Province|1=Iyo Province}}. Claimed lineages include the {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|WD=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana Clan|1=Tachibana clan (kuge)}}, Fujiwara Clan, or descendants of Prince {{ill|Iyo|ja|伊予親王|1=Iyo Shinnō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Shinnō|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大野氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Bungo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Township in {{ill|Ōno District, Gifu|en|Ōno District, Gifu|WD=Q31671|lt=Ōno District, Bungo Province|1=Ōno District, Gifu}}, {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province|1=Bungo Province}}. A branch of the {{ill|Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大神氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|1=Ōga clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438332}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Beppu in {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|WD=Q259705|lt=Higo Province|1=Higo Province}} (referenced in "Kantō Chijōjō-an," Jōō 3, 21st day of the 5th month). Connected to the {{ill|Kino Clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kino Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, descendants of the priests of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū Shrine|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}} in Kyoto. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Manor in {{ill|Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja|高木郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Hizen Province|en|Hizen Province|WD=Q906926|lt=Hizen Province|1=Hizen Province}} (referenced in the "Fukae Family Documents," designated an Important Cultural Property of Saga Prefecture, March 16, 1987). * The '''Ōno Clan''' was also a surname of the {{ill|Xianbei|en|Xianbei|WD=Q861054|lt=Xianbei|1=Xianbei}} or {{ill|Kang-chü|en|Kang-chü|WD=Q1493790|lt=Gaoche|1=Kang-chü}} peoples. It was granted to {{ill|Li Hu (general)|en|Li Hu (general)|WD=Q5370334|lt=Li Hu|1=Li Hu (general)}} by Emperor {{ill|Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja|北魏の孝文帝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

A branch of the {{ill|Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大神氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|1=Ōga clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438332}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Beppu in {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|WD=Q259705|lt=Higo Province|1=Higo Province}} (referenced in "Kantō Chijōjō-an," Jōō 3, 21st day of the 5th month). Connected to the {{ill|Kino Clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kino Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, descendants of the priests of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū Shrine|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}} in Kyoto. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Manor in {{ill|Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja|高木郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Hizen Province|en|Hizen Province|WD=Q906926|lt=Hizen Province|1=Hizen Province}} (referenced in the "Fukae Family Documents," designated an Important Cultural Property of Saga Prefecture, March 16, 1987). * The '''Ōno Clan''' was also a surname of the {{ill|Xianbei|en|Xianbei|WD=Q861054|lt=Xianbei|1=Xianbei}} or {{ill|Kang-chü|en|Kang-chü|WD=Q1493790|lt=Gaoche|1=Kang-chü}} peoples. It was granted to {{ill|Li Hu (general)|en|Li Hu (general)|WD=Q5370334|lt=Li Hu|1=Li Hu (general)}} by Emperor {{ill|Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja|北魏の孝文帝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== See also == * {{ill|Ōno Castle|en|Ōno Castle|WD=Q1206694|lt=Ōno Castle|1=Ōno Castle}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大野氏]]
'''Ōno Clan''' (大野氏) refers to one of the Japanese clans. Apart from the lineage described below, many other clans share this name.
* The ancient aristocratic Ōno Clan was a branch of the {{ill|Kamitsukeno Clan|ja|上毛野氏|1=Kamitsukeno clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitsukeno Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitsukeno clan|qq=}} and bore the title {{ill|Ason|en|Ason|WD=Q4807592|lt=Ason|1=Ason}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Musashi Province)|ja|大野氏 (武蔵国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Musashi Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Village, {{ill|Chichibu District, Saitama|en|Chichibu District, Saitama|WD=Q1145581|lt=Chichibu District, Musashi Province|1=Chichibu District, Saitama}}, {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Owari Province)|ja|大野氏 (尾張国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Owari Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Village, {{ill|Chita District|en|Chita District|WD=Q767312|lt=Chita District, Owari Province|1=Chita District}}, {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}. Descended from the Uno branch of the {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|WD=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (also called the {{ill|Asahi Clan|ja|朝日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Clan|1=Q11517554|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517554}}). * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Echizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (越前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Echizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from {{ill|Ōno District, Fukui|en|Ōno District, Fukui|WD=Q8081656|lt=Ōno District, Echizen Province|1=Ōno District, Fukui}}, {{ill|Echizen Province|en|Echizen Province|WD=Q1047144|lt=Echizen Province|1=Echizen Province}}. Similarly descended from the Shiba branch of the Seiwa Genji. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Harima Province)|ja|大野氏 (播磨国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Harima Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno in Hokujō Township, {{ill|Harima Province|en|Harima Province|WD=Q1047523|lt=Harima Province|1=Harima Province}} (currently Ōno, {{ill|Kakogawa, Hyōgo|en|Kakogawa, Hyōgo|WD=Q750569|lt=Kakogawa, Hyōgo|1=Kakogawa, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture). Claimed descent from the {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|WD=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}} and produced figures such as {{ill|Bunkan|ja|文観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunkan|1=Monkan-bō Kōshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11500110}}, a monk serving Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Iyo Province)|ja|大野氏 (伊予国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Iyo Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno in {{ill|Kita District, Ehime|en|Kita District, Ehime|WD=Q1206404|lt=Kita District, Iyo Province|1=Kita District, Ehime}}, {{ill|Iyo Province|en|Iyo Province|WD=Q907829|lt=Iyo Province|1=Iyo Province}}. Claimed lineages include the {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|WD=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana Clan|1=Tachibana clan (kuge)}}, Fujiwara Clan, or descendants of Prince {{ill|Iyo|ja|伊予親王|1=Iyo Shinnō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Shinnō|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大野氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Bungo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Township in {{ill|Ōno District, Gifu|en|Ōno District, Gifu|WD=Q31671|lt=Ōno District, Bungo Province|1=Ōno District, Gifu}}, {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province|1=Bungo Province}}. A branch of the {{ill|Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|ja|大神氏 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgami Clan (Bungo Province)|1=Ōga clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438332}}. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Higo Province)|qq=}} - Originated from Ōno Beppu in {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|WD=Q259705|lt=Higo Province|1=Higo Province}} (referenced in "Kantō Chijōjō-an," Jōō 3, 21st day of the 5th month). Connected to the {{ill|Kino Clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kino Clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, descendants of the priests of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū Shrine|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}} in Kyoto. * {{ill|Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja|大野氏 (肥前国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Clan (Hizen Province)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Originated from Ōno Manor in {{ill|Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja|高木郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takagi District, Hizen Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Hizen Province|en|Hizen Province|WD=Q906926|lt=Hizen Province|1=Hizen Province}} (referenced in the "Fukae Family Documents," designated an Important Cultural Property of Saga Prefecture, March 16, 1987). * The '''Ōno Clan''' was also a surname of the {{ill|Xianbei|en|Xianbei|WD=Q861054|lt=Xianbei|1=Xianbei}} or {{ill|Kang-chü|en|Kang-chü|WD=Q1493790|lt=Gaoche|1=Kang-chü}} peoples. It was granted to {{ill|Li Hu (general)|en|Li Hu (general)|WD=Q5370334|lt=Li Hu|1=Li Hu (general)}} by Emperor {{ill|Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja|北魏の孝文帝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaowen of Northern Wei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
